en: Hi and welcome to The Winning Factor.
I'm Alan Aitken and on this show each
zh: 我是艾力堅，在本節目中每一……

en: week we take a look at some
upcoming races in Hong Kong, try
zh: 香港即將舉行的賽事，嘗試……

en: to identify an angle to
the race that might lead us to
zh: 這場可能引領我們……的賽事

en: finding the winner. Well it's Saturday racing
this weekend in Hong Kong and
the first race I'm going to
take a look at is race
10 where our winning factor is the map.
zh: 第十場，其致勝因素在於跑法部署。

en: So this is class 3 1600 meters and
zh: 這是三級賽一千六百米……

en: And Blazing Wukong and Amazing Partners
are coming off last start wins.
Endured has been racing well in
similar events without much luck.
Smart Avenue should improve with a better draw.
And Family Jewel and Hymnbook both
look to have chances as well.
So not a one horse
race by any means.
Quite a few chances.
But I'm looking most closely at a
couple of horses I think will cope
zh: 我認為有幾匹馬應能應付。

en: with what looks quite a tricky event
in terms of the map.
And that's Blazing Wukong and Amazing Partners.
Now, Amazing Partners, first of
all, well, he's lightly raced.
zh: 總體而言，他出賽次數不多。

en: He's only had six starts for three wins.
zh: 他僅出賽六次，勝出三次。

en: And this was his latest when he
tackled 1,600 metres for the first time.
zh: 首次角逐一千六百米賽事。

en: This is race 601.
He's in gate four pink colours.
zh: 他抽得四檔，身穿粉紅馬衣。

en: And Amazing Partners jumps well.
He isn't a quick horse naturally.
But Vincent Ho is able to get
him into a position near the lead
zh: 將其帶至領放馬附近位置……

en: through what is a slow first sectional
zh: 穿過首段時間較慢的賽道……

en: before the pace does pick up
a little through the middle stages,
but still is only steady.
A number of Saturday's rivals are here too.
zh: 週六的不少對手亦在此列。

en: In Jude, inside amazing partners
in red and grey,
Mr Dapper, the leader, and Himbuk
in green near the tail.
Now, the field is bunched
here with no serious pace
and becomes just a dash down the straight,
with in Jude on the
inside having no luck.
But amazing partners, well, he's
able to be challenging
at the right time with
enough turn of foot
to reel in the leaders and
he grinds out the win.
Now, despite his good winning record,
zh: 現時，儘管他勝出紀錄良好，……

en: three from six amazing partners,
I don't really think we've seen
zh: 我並不認為我們曾見過……

en: the best of him yet
zh: 他迄今為止的最佳表現。

en: because he's been in several
of these kinds of races
where it's just a grinding sort of finish,
zh: 這是一場艱苦耐力的終點衝刺……

en: difficult to get separation on the field.
zh: 在場上難以取得領先優勢。

en: So he's done well to
put that record together
and that could be a
key thing in Saturday's race.
Now, Blazing Wukong, on the other hand,
He's a little bit more well explored with
11 starts so far for three wins.
zh: 迄今出戰十一場，勝出三場。

en: And here's his latest offering.
zh: 這是他最新推出的賽駒。

en: This is race 643, gate
zh: 這是第六四三場賽事，檔位……

en: 13 in black colours.
And Blazing Wukong jumps okay, but jockey Andrea
zh: 「Blazing Wukong」出閘尚可，但騎師安德里亞……

en: Azzini doesn't even think of looking for a
zh: 阿辛尼甚至沒想過要尋找一個……

en: more forward position going back to the rear.
Now, that prevents him covering extra ground early.
zh: 這使他能避免早段多走額外路程。

en: But we can see on the
heat map it's also a disadvantage
with the slow early speed here.
zh: 在早段速度偏慢的情況下……

en: The pace is a little better mid-race
but never really gets above steady.
zh: 但從未有真正超越穩步。

en: Blazing Wukong then sprints well around the
field, deceptively fast around the field in
fact as they turn into the
stretch and he's the one with
the acceleration to go and pick
up the leaders and put them away.
zh: 超越領先者並將他們拋離。

en: Just like Amazing Partners, not the
most impressive win to the eye
zh: 最引人注目的勝出表現。

en: but what they have in common
is that each of them had to
produce acceleration at the right time, the
right place to go and
win the race and as I said
I think that's going to be important
in the context of Saturday's race.
zh: 就星期六這場賽事而言。

en: Now the leaders Mr Dapper and with
all my faith have the outside gates
zh: 我的信心全在靠外檔位

en: so that is the hope of the
side as far as getting a
better speed but it's quite possible
zh: 速度更佳，但情況相當可能……

en: they could get across quickly and
then steady the brakes and we
might have a similar style of
race to what we've been seeing.
There still looks a little speed in
it, inside or out, and that's not
going to help the likes
of Family Jewel, Endured and others who have
wider draws, while Hymnbook and Smart Avenue
have never really shown as much tactical
speed yet, regardless of their draw.
zh: 尚未展現速度，無論檔位如何。

en: Now Blazing Wukong went all
the way back last time.
We have seen him ridden like that
zh: 我們曾見他策騎如此表現。

en: quite a bit, but he has also
had a lot of wider draws.
This time he's got a better draw, so
zh: 這次他抽得較好檔位，所以……

en: he might even be closer from barrier five.
zh: 他從五檔出發甚至可能更貼近。

en: But we do know that Amazing
Partners has the tactical speed to
be where he needs to be again.
zh: 再次回到他應處的位置。

en: So the tip from me in race 10,
zh: 我對第十場賽事的建議是……

en: Amazing Partners, his winning factor, the map.
zh: 「Amazing Partners」是其致勝因素，跑法部署所在。

en: It does look a very tricky
map, but it could be a
stop start kind of race.
But what we've seen from Amazing Partners, even
zh: 但我們從「Amazing Partners」身上所見，即使……

en: in those kinds of races, is that he's
zh: 在這種類型的賽事中，他是……

en: able to put himself in the right place.
able to accelerate at the right
time and that might be the
winning recipe for this event.
The other race I want to take
a look at on Sunday is the
final event, race 11 and our
zh: 最後一場賽事，第十一場，而我們……

en: winning factor here, the draw.
zh: 此處的致勝因素是檔位。

en: So this is class two, an
excellent class two in fact, over
1200 metres and despite the
talent in the race, I think we can
zh: 這場賽事人才濟濟，我認為我們可以……

en: narrow this down to three really strong chances.
zh: 將範圍縮減至三個極具實力的競爭對手。

en: a patch of stars who
zh: 一匹名為「Patch of Stars」的馬……

en: continues to race well,
and two horses we expect to see figuring
zh: 預期會有兩匹馬參與競爭……

en: in some serious races in the future,
Jamie Richards' trained Bulb General and
the unbeaten three-year-old Hot Delight.
And I'm most interested in this race
zh: 我對這場賽事最感興趣。

en: in those two lightly raced horses.
zh: 在兩匹出賽較少的馬匹之中。

en: As I said, Hot Delight,
unbeaten, three from three,
and Bulb General, a year older, and
zh: 而 Bulb General 年長一歲，且……

en: he's three wins from five starts.
Now, firstly, Hot Delight, and
his trainer, Francis Loy,
has made comparisons at the same
stage with a horse that you
might be familiar with that he
used to train, Golden 60.
That's a big call.
Certainly there's a lot of water
to flow under
the bridge for that one, but he
can't be faulted in what he's done
so far. This is race 540. He's
zh: 至今為止。這是第五十四場賽事。他……

en: in gate seven in yellow and red
zh: 身披黃紅配色的七檔馬匹……

en: colours and Hot Delight jumps well for
Vincent Ho and is quickly
up on the speed in what you
can see is a slow first 400
zh: 可見首四百米速度較慢……

en: metre section with Ho on the odds
zh: 何澤堯策騎的賠率馬匹米數路段……

en: on favourite here taking bad
zh: 今場熱門馬匹狀況不佳……

en: luck out of the equation.
zh: 將運氣排除在考量之外。

en: Now the pace does lift a
little as the race progresses then
becomes a strong sprint home
down the stretch.
The leader fights on well but
ultimately Hot Delight is too good
and comes clear to win
with some conviction.
Now perhaps to the eye not
zh: 或許在旁人眼中並非如此……

en: deserving the kind of boom that
we're talking about on this horse
But the way the race was
run there meant that to win
zh: 跑至該處意味著要勝出。

en: it the way he did,
Hot Delight had to break 44
seconds for his last 800 metres.
And that's the kind of sustained speed that
is going to make this young horse
a star of the future as
he develops and grows stronger.
As to Bulb General, well, as
I mentioned, he's a year older.
And really, he was this time last
year where Hot Delight is now.
zh: 今時今日「Hot Delight」所處的年份……

en: He was an up-and-comer with a great
turn of foot as a three-year-old.
He took that into his
early starts as a four-year-old,
but then his career was interrupted by injury.
zh: 但其後其競賽生涯因傷中斷。

en: He's only had the one
run back in March,
and let's have a look
at how he handled that.
This is race 562, gate seven
zh: 這是第 562 場賽事，七檔。

en: here in orange and white colours.
Bulb General jumps well for Zach Burton,
zh: 「Bulb General」為 Zach Burton 順利出閘。

en: but this race is a contrast with
zh: 但這場賽事與……形成對比

en: the one that we just saw,
as the early speed here is pretty good.
Zach lets Bulb General find his
feet as is usual and he
ends up towards the rear with
another of Saturday's rivals Patch of Stars in
zh: 星期六另一匹對手「Patch of Stars」在……

en: yellow, white and blue a few lengths ahead
zh: 身穿黃、白及藍衣的馬匹領先數個馬位……

en: of him on the rail.
Now the pace increases again mid-race
zh: 現時中段步速再次加快。

en: so it's really run to suit
zh: 所以是真正適宜的競逐……

en: horses off the pace and
when they straighten up Patch of Stars comes
zh: 當他們走直路時，「Patch of Stars」跟隨……

en: to pounce, he comes up short behind Young
zh: 企圖搶攻，他落敗於「Young」之後。

en: Champion with Bulb General working
home steadily into third.
Now Bob General will meet the
first two that beat him home
zh: 領先他衝線的前兩匹馬……

en: there on Saturday, but they
were hard race fit horses and he
zh: 是狀態硬朗的賽駒，而他……

en: was coming off quite a lengthy break.
zh: 剛結束一段較長的休賽期……

en: So I do think he's going
to tighten up and be a
better version of himself on Saturday.
zh: 週六展現出更出色的自己……

en: But I think when we go to the
draw, that's where things are really getting interesting
zh: 檔位揭曉，局勢至此愈發精彩。

en: in this race.
There's good speed out wide here from Victor
zh: 外檔有速度來自維克多……

en: the winner, Crimson Flash and Ladies Choice.
So the tempo looks sound enough.
Bob General is drawn lower this
zh: 鮑勃·傑納爾抽得較低檔位……

en: time, while he's still not going
to be on the front end
of the race.
His jockey this time, Joe Marrera,
should be able to use that
draw to get a nice trip
zh: 抽得有利檔位以策騎順暢。

en: through the race.
Harry Bentley takes over on Hot Delight with
the light weight, but his map looks filled
zh: 輕磅，但跑法部署看似擁擠……

en: with a lot of decisions to
make, and tough ones they are.
zh: 是艱難的賽事，而且確實如此。

en: We saw Hot Delight up on the
speed, his last two starts in slow
zh: 速度，其最近兩場在慢速……

en: tempos, but with a better
pace and a wide draw here
he would have trouble getting to
a similar spot without covering ground
zh: 處於相似位置而未須覆蓋更多路程……

en: and working and might even have to
zh: 正在操練，甚至可能必須……

en: drag all the way back in the
field so that he doesn't have a
difficult run so the tip from me
zh: 艱難的賽事，故我的建議是……

en: in race 11 bulb general his winning
zh: 第十一場「Bulb General」的致勝因素……

en: factor the draw now had they
drawn the other way around i'm sure
zh: 檔位安排剛好相反，我敢肯定。

en: that i would have been tipping hot
delight but his job looks
zh: 令人欣喜，但他的任務看來……

en: full of difficulties.
He's good enough to overcome them.
zh: 他有足夠實力超越對手。

en: I certainly don't want to
say it's lights out for his chances but
it brings him back to the older horse
zh: 這使他再次面對年長賽駒。

en: who has drawn better this time, Bulb General,
zh: 今次誰的檔位抽得較佳？Bulb General，

en: and should be fitter than he was
for that first up run.
Well that's it from the Winning Factor this
zh: 至此，《致勝因素》本集節目……

en: week. Good
luck on Saturday. We'll see you next time.
